name: fai-jira-plugin
description: Jira integration plugin for FAI — 4 MCP tools, dedicated agent, compatible plays

tools.name: jira_issue_create
tools.description: Create a Jira issue with type, priority, labels, components, and custom fields

tools.name: jira_sprint_query
tools.description: Query Jira sprint content — backlog, in-progress, done items with story points

tools.name: jira_board_update
tools.description: Update a Jira board — move items between columns, update status

tools.name: jira_release_track
tools.description: Track Jira release progress — issues resolved, remaining, blockers
